item.name: Text 8
item.text: In the Badge group, under Elements -> Profile picture, replace the image with your own by selecting it and clicking Replace Media on the right. Under LIGHT or DARK, edit your name and role and choose your preferred background color.

item.name: Text 8
item.text: Once you're happy with your animation, click Export in the top right corner and choose your export format (we recommend mp4 or GIF). Don't forget to share the result on social media using the hashtag #Config2025!

item.name: Text 8
item.text: Copy the animated stickers you like from the artboard on the right and paste them onto your main scene. You can change when they appear by dragging the animations left or right on the timeline.

item.name: Text 8
item.text: Under the Config 2025 artboard on the left, expand the Intro group and try hiding and revealing the options to pick the one you like best. Feel free to edit the text and change the background color under each option (feel free to use the _COLORS artboard for inspo!).
